name: Chall 16x18 Lofted Shed Plan - A Gable-Roof Workshop with Elevated Storage & Classic Charm
open_features: 16x18 Gable Shed with Loft - Generous main level plus elevated storage for totes, tools, decor, and gear
DIY-Friendly Plans - Clear instructions and simplified framing layouts for efficient building
Wide Double Door Entry - Ideal for equipment, lawn tools, bikes, and large project materials
Clean Modern-Traditional Aesthetic - Vertical siding, crisp trim, and balanced gable symmetry
Extremely Flexible Layout - Perfect for a workshop, art studio, storage barn, hobby shed, or backyard office
Loft: Overhead storage loft maximizes usable interior space
Height: Tall gable roof structure for improved airflow and interior spaciousness
description_summary: Elevate your backyard potential with the Chall Lofted Shed Plan - a spacious 16x18 gable-roof structure that blends timeless architecture with highly functional design. Featuring a built-in loft, wide double-door access, and clean vertical siding, the Chall delivers both beauty and efficiency for homeowners who need serious storage, creative workspace, or a versatile backyard retreat.
